title: The Training Ride - Le Tour de Weston 2026
raw_visible_text: LE TOUR DE WESTON 2026 THE TRAINING RIDE PRESENTED BY REVOLT CYCLERY SATURDAY MARCH 28TH 60 MILES PACE 22-24 MPH STARTS AT 6:30 AM FROM REVOLT CYCLERY 1305 SHOTGUN RD SUNRISE FL 33326
image_description: Professional event flyer with dark blue background. Le Tour de Weston 2026 branding. The Training Ride presented by Revolt Cyclery. Saturday March 28th. 60 miles, pace 22-24 mph. Starts at 6:30 AM from Revolt Cyclery at 1305 Shotgun Rd, Sunrise FL 33326. Sponsor logos: LITET, Weston city logo, Alex's Bicycle.
weather_summary: Dry (5% rain), light winds 8 mph NNW

title: FP Bike Shop 2nd Anniversary and Store Celebration Ride
address_note: 1800 N Commerce Pkwy Suite #2, Weston, FL 33326
raw_visible_text:
fpbikeshop and pd.cyclingclub
Invitation to Our Dear People
ANNIVERSARY AND STORE CELEBRATION!
Honoring our 2nd year, FP Bike Shop invites you to ride with us on our third consecutive ride.
Dear people of Weston and surroundings: Come to ride and celebrate with us.
Saturday April 04 04 2026
1800 N Commerce Pkwy Suite #2, Weston, FL 33326
🚴 PEDALS UP: 6:00 AM
🏆 GROUP A 🚴 / GROUP B 🏆
🎉 ALL TOTALLY FREE & WITH DOUBLE SAG SUPPORT
🎁 RAFFLES AND PRIZES AT THE
🏆 SPECIAL PRIZE FOR GRUPO A!
🎁 SPECIAL GUEST RIDING WITH US!
📱 (786) 709-5567
RESERVATIONS:
fpbikeshop FPBIKESHOP celebrates 2 amazing years with our beloved community 🚴...
